conversation_context.user_goal: Close the concrete gaps in 03-query-export by prioritizing unfinished work and moving the SDK path forward.
user_constraints: Do not assess this track from docs alone; verify the actual code path too.
Work in priority order and keep the handoff concise.
decisions: Public SDK search/Markdown/structured JSON should route through the query-export adapter without hiding upstream fidelity blockers.
Validation status must distinguish query-export greens from unrelated existing repo failures.
conversation_context.latest_user_request: Prioritize the unfinished items and move through them one by one.
open_questions: When 02-read snapshot shape stabilizes further, whether the current public query-export snapshot should freeze as-is or be adapted once more.

subtasks.notes: SDK search now routes through canonical snapshot search and returns anchor metadata, but exact upstream page/run semantics still depend on 02-read.
SDK Markdown export now uses query-export warning and fallback rules, while unresolved read-side discriminators remain provisional.
Public JSON export now returns the structured envelope, but exact optional and raw fields still depend on 02-read stabilization.
